title: selaginella helvetica subsp. pseudonipponica
intro: Selaginella helvetica subsp. pseudonipponica is a species of spikemoss, a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella helvetica subsp. pseudonipponica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant may include dried leaves or stems for teas, infusions, or capsules, although its use should be supported by scientific evidence and consulted with a healthcare professional.
